VAL-GW-005.evidence: GET /api/sessions/seeded-session-1 returned HTTP 200 with messages array containing 2 seeded messages with correct MessageDTO fields.
VAL-GW-005.details: HTTP 200. messages count=2. message[0]: id=seeded-message-1, role=user, content='Seeded user message'. message[1]: id=seeded-message-2, role=assistant, content='Seeded assistant reply'. hasMore=false, nextCursor=null. All MessageDTO fields (id, role, content, timestamp) present.

VAL-GW-014.evidence: POST /api/workspaces/default/sessions with workingDirectory returned 201 with workingDirectory in response. Subsequent GET returned matching workingDirectory field.
VAL-GW-014.details: POST HTTP 201. Response: id=session-2, name=val-test-session, workingDirectory=/tmp/test-project. GET /api/sessions/session-2 HTTP 200. Response contains name=val-test-session, workingDirectory=/tmp/test-project. Both CreateSessionOptions and SessionDTO correctly serialize workingDirectory.
